blocks.content: The AIM group chat had changed. Brooke was in it now — she fit quickly, and nobody had voted on it.
One night in late September, Eli changed the group name from MILLHAVEN MIDDLE SURVIVORS to 8TH GRADE FINAL BOSS. Savannah immediately changed it back.
this is historically significant we cannot go back to the old name
she's right. the old name stays.
lol I like the old one better too sorry eli
outvoted in my own chat. this is exactly why democracy is complicated.
you literally run for class president every year

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Easy was good. He was choosing easy.
